hero_home.heading: Pipelines designed with engineering precision.
hero_home.description: From pre-project analyses and piping flexibility studies, through executive and as-built designs, to 3D laser scanning and modelling — with expert automation support at every stage of the project.

hero_uslugi.heading:
Comprehensive engineering services
for the energy sector
hero_uslugi.subheading: Specialist piping engineering services — from analyses and designs, through 3D scanning and modelling, to expert automation support and compliance verification with IRiESP and NC-RfG.

realizacje.title: EC Katowice — Process steam pipeline modernisation
realizacje.description: Executive design for the modernisation of steam and condensate pipeline networks at a combined heat and power plant. Flexibility analysis, isometrics and compensator selection.

realizacje.title: KGHM Polska Miedź — Mine process installations
realizacje.description: Executive documentation for cooling and compressed air pipeline installations. Laser scanning and 3D modelling of existing infrastructure.

realizacje.title: PKN Orlen — As-built model of fuel terminal
realizacje.description: 3D laser scanning and digital model development of a fuel terminal. Clash detection against new infrastructure and update of as-built documentation.

realizacje.title: Enea Wytwarzanie — Steam pipeline analysis for power unit
realizacje.description: Comprehensive flexibility analysis of steam and feed pipelines for a 200 MW power unit. Optimisation of support and thermal compensator layout.

realizacje.title: Tauron Polska Energia — IRiESP control logic verification
realizacje.description: Analysis and verification of control logics for a generation unit in terms of compliance with the Transmission System Operation and Maintenance Instructions and NC-RfG requirements.

realizacje.title: Lotos Petrobaltic — Process installation for offshore platform
realizacje.description: Executive design of process and utility installations for an offshore production platform in the Baltic Sea. Selection of marine corrosion-resistant materials and standards verification.

uslugi.title: Pre-project analyses
uslugi.description: Comprehensive preliminary studies and feasibility assessments prior to piping project execution. Route, layout and material optimisation for energy and industrial environments.

uslugi.title: Piping flexibility analysis
uslugi.description: FEM-based stress and flexibility analyses. Assessment of thermal, mechanical and dynamic stresses in accordance with EN, ASME and sector-specific energy standards.

uslugi.title: Executive & as-built designs
uslugi.description: Complete executive and as-built technical documentation compliant with industry standards. Isometrics, P&ID diagrams, material lists — for the energy and industrial sectors.

uslugi.title: 3D laser scanning
uslugi.description: Precision laser scanning of existing industrial and energy installations. Generation of high-resolution point clouds as the basis for further design work.

uslugi.title: 3D installation modelling
uslugi.description: Creation of accurate digital models of piping installations based on scans and documentation. PDMS, SP3D, E3D formats. Complete as-built documentation for asset management.

uslugi.title: Automation — IRiESP & NC-RfG
uslugi.description: Expert automation support at all project stages. Analysis and verification of control logics in compliance with IRiESP requirements and the European NC-RfG standard.

paragraphs: Energy Piping Design Sp. z o.o. was established in 2017 in response to growing market demand for specialised piping engineering services in the energy sector. The company was founded by experienced engineers with extensive practice on the largest Polish and European energy projects.

In 2019, we expanded our offering to include advanced 3D laser scanning services, becoming one of the few companies in Poland combining design expertise with digital reproduction capabilities for existing installations.

In 2021, we established strategic partnerships with Western European companies, enabling the execution of cross-border projects and implementation of NC-RfG compliant methodologies on European markets. Today, EPDesign comprises more than 20 specialist engineers completing over a dozen projects annually for the energy, petrochemical and industrial sectors.

timeline.text: Establishment of Energy Piping Design in Warsaw
Launch of 3D laser scanning and modelling services
First IRiESP logic verification and NC-RfG certification
Over 60 completed projects in Poland and abroad

kontakt.firma: Energy Piping Design Sp. z o.o.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.content: The controller of your personal data is Energy Piping Design Sp. z o.o., ul. Jesionowa 15, 40-159 Katowice, Poland, VAT: PL9542829277. Contact: kontakt@ep-design.pl.

sections.heading: 2. Purpose and Legal Basis
sections.content: Personal data provided via the contact form (name, company, email, phone, message) are processed solely for the purpose of responding to your inquiry. The legal basis is your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.heading: 3. Recipients
sections.content: Your data are not sold or shared with third parties. They may be passed to technical service providers (hosting, email delivery) only to the extent necessary to handle your inquiry, under data processing agreements.

sections.heading: 4. Retention Period
sections.content: Data are retained until your inquiry is resolved and thereafter for the period required to defend potential legal claims — no longer than 3 years from the date of contact.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, and port your data, and to object to processing. You may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (in Poland: UODO, ul. Stawki 2, Warsaw).

sections.heading: 6. Cookies and localStorage
sections.content: The site does not use analytical or marketing cookies. The browser stores only the selected colour theme (light/dark) via localStorage — this data is not sent to any server or shared with third parties.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any data protection enquiries, please contact: kontakt@ep-design.pl.
